g.text: Task Control Block (TCB) - Memory Structure (0x20 Bytes)

ol.li: Context Atomicity: All code within the SWITCHING block must execute with EFLAGS.IF = 0 (Interrupts disabled) to prevent re-entrant scheduling.
CR3 Reloading: The Page Directory Base Register (CR3) must be reloaded if next_task->mm != current_task->mm, triggering a TLB flush.
TSS Update: tss.esp0 must point to the top of the new task's kernel stack to handle future interrupts/traps from ring 3.
